user.title: Connect to Nuki OTP
user.description: Set up your Nuki OTP integration

data_description.api_url: Base URL of the Nuki Web API. Leave the default unless you have been told to use a different endpoint.
data_description.api_token: Nuki Web API token generated from your Nuki account at web.nuki.io (Account → API).
data_description.nuki_name: Name of the smart lock exactly as it appears in your Nuki account. Used to find the device to manage OTP codes for.
data_description.otp_username: Name given to the temporary keypad code created by this integration. Helps you recognise it in the Nuki app.
data_description.otp_lifetime_hours: How long each generated OTP code stays valid, in hours (1–168). After this it expires and is removed.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Nuki OTP
reauth_confirm.description: The API token for {nuki_name} was rejected. Enter a new Nuki Web API token to restore access.

data_description.api_token: Nuki Web API token generated from your Nuki account at web.nuki.io (Account → API).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Nuki API

abort.already_configured: This Nuki device is already configured

init.title: Nuki OTP Options
init.description: Update editable settings. Saving reloads the integration with the new values.

data_description.otp_username: Name given to the temporary keypad code created by this integration. Helps you recognise it in the Nuki app.
data_description.otp_lifetime_hours: How long each generated OTP code stays valid, in hours (1–168). After this it expires and is removed.
